[@microsoft/fast-element/declarative.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [PartialFASTElementDefinition](../fast-element.partialfastelementdefinition/index.html)

## PartialFASTElementDefinition interface

Represents metadata configuration for a custom element.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface PartialFASTElementDefinition<TType extends Constructable<HTMLElement> = Constructable<HTMLElement>>
```
